heading: Preliminary response to petition
label: 323 Preliminary response to petition
text: If a post-grant review petition is filed under section 321, the patent owner shall have the right to file a preliminary response to the petition, within a time period set by the Director, that sets forth reasons why no post-grant review should be instituted based upon the failure of the petition to meet any requirement of this chapter.
notes: Effective DateSection effective upon the expiration of the 1-year period beginning , and applicable only to patents described in ( note), with certain exceptions and limitations, see section 6(f)(2), (3) of , set out as a note under .Sept. 16, 2011section 3(n)(1) of Pub.
